system.description: You know how to use light Melee weapons effectively. These include butterfly swords, daggers, fans, fly-whisks, iron hats, needles, nets, and sticks. When you attack with such a weapon, make a Light Melee Skill roll against your opponent's Parry Score. If you are throwing the weapon, roll against Evade instead. On a Success, roll Damage Dice based on the weapon against your foe's Hardiness.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 1: Skills
